title: EARLY CHILDHOOD NURSING - 211info
text: MARION COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION EARLY CHILDHOOD NURSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides free home visiting services. Visits are conducted by public health nurses with the goal of promoting physical, social, and emotional health. Services include: Education about pregnancy, parenting, nutrition, safety, child development, and medical guidance on accessing the health care system and understanding health conditions. Provides local resources, such as WIC, immunizations, health care, early intervention, therapies, insurance assistance, DHS services (examples: self-sufficiency and developmental disabilities), and more. Screenings and assessments for pregnant/postpartum women and children. 3160 Center Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Pregnant women, children (0-21 years), and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 373-3781 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 373-3781 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to register FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Case/Care Management * Families with Infants/Toddlers Home Based Parenting Education Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs Teen Expectant/New Parent Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MARION COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION
